subcodes.first_line: The Hidden One beareth witness unto His Own Self that, verily, I am God; there is none other God but Me. I have manifested whatsoever I desired before the faces of My servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الغیب لنفسه بنفسه بانی انا الله لا اله الا انا قد اظهرت ما اردت امام وجوه العباد
